proteins.title: Clean win — model nails the allosteric pocket
proteins.blurb: Phosphofructokinase-1 style regulation. High-AUROC case where pocket geometry, dynamics, and ESM-2 all agree on the regulatory site.

proteins.title: Kinase family — the clinically critical case
proteins.blurb: Kinases are 35% of drug targets and the domain where allosteric inhibitors (e.g. asciminib for CML) are transforming therapy. Model correctly flags the allosteric pocket away from the ATP site.

proteins.title: Generalization beyond the training distribution
proteins.blurb: Test protein with <30% identity to anything in training. Strong prediction demonstrates the model learned structure-function patterns, not sequence memorization.

proteins.title: Interface allostery — the novel failure mode
proteins.blurb: Allosteric site sits on a flat protein-protein interface. FPocket returns null features. Model defaults to the active-site pocket and gets it backwards (AUROC 0.25 — worse than random). This is the pocket-bias blind spot affecting the entire field.

proteins.title: Second interface-allostery case — same blind spot
proteins.blurb: Different enzyme family, same failure pattern. Any predictor relying on pocket geometry — and most in the literature do — shares this blind spot.
